name: crud-api
description: Simple CRUD API using in-memory database

scripts.start:prod: npx cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build && node --env-file=.env dist/index.js
scripts.dev:servererror: npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development ENABLE_SERVER_ERROR_TEST=true node --env-file=.env --experimental-strip-types --watch src/index.ts

author: JesperHogstedDk
